stemHtml: Which of the following best describes the appearance of the turn coordinator?

options.a: An aircraft symbol with wingtip markings for Rate 1 turn and "NO PITCH INFORMATION" text.
options.b: An aircraft symbol with wingtip markings for Rates 1, 2, and 3.
options.c: A single needle with markings for Rates 1, 2, and 3.
options.d: A single needle with a Rate 1 marking and "NO PITCH INFORMATION" text.
